name: com.52choujiang/kuaishou-insights
title: SocialDataX 快手 Kuaishou MCP
description: 快手/Kuaishou hot list, work search/details, comments/replies, creator profiles, works.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer API key from SocialDataX / 社媒数据助手

tools.name: kuaishou_get_hot_search_list
tools.description: Get the current Kuaishou / 快手 short-video hot list.

tools.name: kuaishou_search_videos
tools.description: Search Kuaishou works by natural-language keyword with optional paging.

tools.name: kuaishou_get_video_detail_by_photo_id
tools.description: Fetch structured work details when the caller already has a photo_id.

tools.name: kuaishou_get_video_detail_by_url
tools.description: Resolve a Kuaishou work page link, short link, or share text into structured work details.

tools.name: kuaishou_get_video_comments_by_photo_id
tools.description: Fetch paginated first-level comments when the caller already has a photo_id.

tools.name: kuaishou_get_video_comments_by_url
tools.description: Fetch paginated first-level comments directly from a Kuaishou work page link, short link, or share text.

tools.name: kuaishou_get_video_comment_replies_by_comment_id
tools.description: Fetch paginated replies under a first-level comment by photo_id and comment_id.

tools.name: kuaishou_get_user_info_by_user_id
tools.description: Fetch creator profile data when the caller already has a user_id.

tools.name: kuaishou_get_user_info_by_profile_url
tools.description: Resolve a Kuaishou profile link, short link, or share text into creator profile data.

tools.name: kuaishou_get_user_posted_videos_by_user_id
tools.description: Fetch a paginated list of works published by a creator when the caller already has a user_id.

tools.name: kuaishou_get_user_posted_videos_by_profile_url
tools.description: Fetch a paginated list of works published by a creator from a profile link, short link, or share text.
